executive_summary: - Added PocketBase handler to integrate with MindsDB via REST API.
- Enables querying PocketBase collections using MindsDB SQL syntax.
- Includes authentication, table creation, and CRUD operations.
- Updates documentation and environment variables for better integration.
- Adds support for PocketBase collections in tests and integration flows.

change_units.title: PocketBase Handler
change_units.description: Adds a new PocketBase integration to MindsDB for querying collections.
change_units.inferred_intent: Non-breaking change to add new functionality
change_units.evidence: Commit #1675 - additional test for mysql api

change_units.title: Mocks and Fixes
change_units.description: Fixes issues in the integration and adds support for MSSQL conversion.
change_units.inferred_intent: Non-breaking change to fix existing issues

change_units.title: Updated Documentation
change_units.description: Updated documentation for environment variables and connection parameters.
change_units.evidence: Commit #11667 - Updated documentation for ENV Variables

risks_and_concerns: Potential issues with PocketBase authentication and connection handling.
Ensuring compatibility with different MSSQL versions and configurations.
Risk of exposing sensitive credentials in version control.
